tax: Placed at genus rank, Rimeling is defined by composition and formation mechanics, not by colour, size, or danger: a creeping needle-ice body. A new species belongs here only if it shows a rime-ice body.
ap: The grouping is recognised by a feathery rime-front. A field surveyor confirms membership from at least one persistent marker — breath-frost and frost-crack rings — which survives even when the body disperses.
eco: Rimeling occupies cold seeps and ice galleries. Persistence is elemental rather than reproductive: members form where water-pressure freezes a cold seep and recur with the cold seep refreezes, sustaining themselves on cold-seep water.
beh: Across the grouping, behaviour is the disturbance-response of the medium: creeps and locks feet in fresh ice. Roles, moods, and summoning circumstances are recorded on the entries below, not treated as new taxa.
traitsText: Shared characters: rime body and cold-sense. These are grouping-level traits only; specific resistances, abilities, and field signs belong to each species and species beneath this node.
abilities: Grouping-level abilities are the broad capacities implied by the shared body: freezing-advance and immobilising. Named, bounded powers are assigned to the species that actually possess them.
bg: In the Throat, Rimeling matters because immobilises crews in cold galleries. It lets survey reports sort creeping-rime forms from hail-cloud ones without collapsing distinct hazards into one vague label.
g: Rimeling is the genus-rank grouping of rime-ice creeping elementals within the True Elementals. Its members share a needle-ice body that creeps and freezes prey in place, and divide below into species groups by ice habit and creep rate. A freezing crust that grows toward you.
